titleStmt.title: SII 6.1182: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1182. (A.R. No. 365-XV of 1899). ON THE WALL TO THE PROPER RIGHT OF THE WESTERN ENTRANCE INTO THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Āsīt bharadvājapavitragōtrajassamastaśāstrā¨rtthaparā¨rttasāraḥ śrīkēśavā¨ryyassatuyajvanāma
kō guruḥ paraṁ yō gruhamēdhadha¨rmmiṇāṁ . tasyaurasōpyasti samastaśāstraśīlassutō yaśōbhi
¨rbhuvanēṣu biśrutaḥ sadāśrayassvāśramadha¨rmmadha¨rmmiṇāṁ śrīrāmasūrī bhuvi sūriṇāṁ varaḥ [. 1*] śākā
bdē nidhinētracaṁdraśaśibhi¨rñātē ca mēṣaṁ gatē sū¨ryyē sūrivarōyamatra divasē śaurē ca vārē ravēḥ pitrōḥ svasya ca maṁgalā¨rttha
makhilakṣēmāya dīpaṁ dadau yāvat caṁdradivākaraṁ sruharayē siṁhācala sthāyinē [. 2*] svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1129 gunēṇṭi mēṣasaṁkrā(ṁ)ntinimittamuna śrīmat jīhari śrīnarasiṁhadēvaraku sakalakalāpariṇa
tulaina śrīrāmabhaṭṭōpādhyāyulu tama talli sūrannavvaku tama taṁḍri kēśavabhaṭṭōpādhyāyulaku dha¨rmmu
vugāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṁḍadīpa mokkaṇṭiki Ī dēvaśrībhaṁḍāramunaṁdu [O]ḍkina bīragoṭṭapugadya
lu padi Ī māḍalu ḍuttāḍa narasiṁhamuniyati ceṟuvunaṁ beṭṭi groppiṁcuṭaṁ jēsi Ī ceṟuvuḍigiṭa puṭṭaṁḍunēṁdu
mu nēlaku ṟālupānti Ī polamuna phalabhōgamuna pratisaṁvatsaraṁbulaṁdu nitya narasihamānika māneṁḍu
nēti lekka nacaṁdra¨rkkamuṁ jellaṁggāladigā śrāvaṇasahitamugā peṭṭiri Ī dha¨rmmu vuṁpiṁcchinavāru gaṁgakaṟuta vēyi gōdānamulu sēsina phalamu pa
ḍayaṁgalāru Ī dha¨rmmuvu vighnamusēsinavāru gaṁggaka(ṁ)ṛtu vēyi kavilamōdāla vadhasēsina pāpamuna paḍaṁgalāru śatruṇāpi kritō dha¨rmmaḥ
pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syātna dha¨rmaḥ kasyaci(ṁ)dripuḥ . Ī dha¨rmmamu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa .
Digital edition of SII 6.1182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
